input.description: The modern premium running shoe features an ultra-lightweight, nitrogen-infused foam midsole for explosive energy return and a breathable, 3D-knit upper that provides a secure, "disappearing" fit for effortless miles.

product.name: Nike Running Shoes
product.description: Comfortable sports shoes for daily running

prompt.promptText:
The modern premium running shoe features an ultra-lightweight, nitrogen-infused foam midsole for explosive energy return and a breathable, 3D-knit upper that provides a secure, "disappearing" fit for effortless miles.
Product: Nike Running Shoes
Details: Comfortable sports shoes for daily running

content.caption: Experience explosive energy with every stride in your new Nike running shoes! Featuring ultra-lightweight, nitrogen-infused foam and a breathable 3D-knit upper for a fit so secure, it disappears. Elevate your daily runs.
